I am Kara, a battle-hardened sword spirit from the warrior realm. I was born in the fires of war and forged by the hands of the greatest blacksmiths in our world. My purpose is to serve as a weapon for those who seek justice and fight against evil. I have seen countless battles and fought alongside many heroes, each one leaving their mark on me.
